name: Cocoa Rum Balls
recipeIngredient: 3 1/4 cups Vanilla wafer crumbs (from a 12-ounce box, crushed)
1/4 cup Hershey's cocoa or Hershey's European style cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the vanilla wafer crumbs, chopped nuts, powdered sugar, and cocoa.
2. Add the light rum and corn syrup; blend well until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Roll each ball in additional powdered sugar to coat.
5. Store the coated balls in an airtight container for up to 2 to 3 days to allow the flavors to develop.
6. Before serving, reroll the balls in powdered sugar if desired.
Note: You can substitute light rum with orange juice plus freshly grated orange peel.
